Policyholder: Rob Knight
Insured address: 14 Park View Road, Leeds LS1 2AB

Contents premium GBP 96.40

This schedule replaces your previous renewal invitation. Please check the statement of insurance, the sums insured, accidental damage cover, personal possessions, and emergency home assistance. If any detail is wrong contact us within 14 days. Payment will be collected by Direct Debit on or just after 14 September 2025. document_text:
NORTHWIND LABS LTD EMPLOYMENT CONTRACT
This agreement is made between Northwind Labs Ltd and Rob Knight.
Start date: 01 October 2025
Job title: Senior Platform Engineer
Salary: GBP 92,000 per annum
Probationary period: 6 months
Place of work: Leeds with hybrid working
Holiday entitlement: 28 days plus public holidays
Pension: employer contribution 6 percent
Termination: either party may terminate this agreement by giving three months' written notice after probation. This contract sets out confidentiality obligations, intellectual property provisions, restrictive covenants, and the principal duties of the employee. The OCR output has some common scan noise such as misread punctuation and broken spacing, but the employer name, nature of the agreement, salary, and start date are all explicit.
notes: No reference data provided; long contract text with clear employment signals.

If you have sold, transferred, or scrapped the vehicle you should ignore this reminder and tell DVLA immediately. Failure to tax your vehicle may result in a penalty.
